title: ozoroa kwangoensis
intro: Ozoroa kwangoensis, also known as the Kwango cork tree, is a plant species in the family Anacardiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Ozoroa kwangoensis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
